name: Chocolate Smunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chocolate pudding according to the package directions using nonfat milk.
2. Allow the mixture to cool thoroughly.
3. Stir in peanut butter until well combined.
4. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the pudding onto one Graham cracker square.
5. Place a layer of low-calorie whipped topping on top of the pudding.
6. Cover with another Graham cracker square.
7. Freeze until ready to serve.
Each serving contains approximately:
- 200 calories
- 1 starch
- 1 portion mediterranean meat (peanut butter)
- 1 portion fat (peanut butter, 17 grams carbohydrate, 8 grams protein, 12 grams fat, 142 mg sodium)
Adapted from Exchanges for All Occasions by Marion Franz, 1993 edition. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Jan 94.
